title: aureolaria calycosa
intro: Aureolaria calycosa, also known as the western yellow gentian or bottle gentian, is a flowering plant species native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Aureolaria calycosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cold symptoms, and aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
